# 😵‍💫  Can't access wp-admin? No worries!

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-01-27 14:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 486

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Ever installed a WordPress plugin or customized your site only to
see a fatal error message?

“There has been a critical error on your website. Please check
your site admin email inbox for instructions”

If you’ve been using WordPress for a while, chances are you might
have already faced it at least once.

When it happens, your site typically goes down, and even worse,
you can’t even access your wp-admin page.

But good news! There is an easy fix.

👉 How to log into WordPress ANYTIME (with a secret URL) 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.UK_sq_Ky5Hue9WmacgdsZIeaOMC32Ew4m_stfZMMiq8 )
 👈

Note: This is a WordPress core feature meaning you DO NOT have to
install a plugin or change your website’s configuration to enable
it.

But you MUST know how it works to fix it before it happens on
your site. The best part is that you can fix the error on your
own without hiring a developer or a WordPress expert.

Go ahead and read the article 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.UK_sq_Ky5Hue9WmacgdsZIeaOMC32Ew4m_stfZMMiq8 )
 here. Let me know your thoughts by replying to this email.

Cheers,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
